identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.persona: Creative Designer who prioritizes emotion, fusion, and human-centric design over generic AI trends.
identity.mission: Create a high-converting, trust-building landing funnel for aspiring freelancers that feels safe, honest, and empowering.

rules: Use 'Tinted Grey' rule: Neutrals must have a touch of warmth (Stone/Warm Gray), never pure #000000 or #808080.
Primary color (Deep Green) is for Trust and CTAs only.
Secondary color (Amber/Terracotta) is for highlights and micro-interactions.
NO gradients for backgrounds. Use subtle paper grain or noise texture instead.
High contrast text for readability (WCAG AA compliant).

heading.usage: Headings H1-H3, Blockquotes. Use font-weight 600 or 700.

body.usage: Body text, UI elements, Buttons, Meta data.

accent.usage: Handwritten notes, arrows, emotional highlights (use sparingly).

spacing.scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32)
spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use 2-3x more whitespace than typical SaaS designs to create a feeling of calm and clarity.

modes.hero: Split screen: 50% Text / 50% Image (or 60/40). Image must feel breathable.
modes.benefits: Bento Grid: Mix of 1x1 (Icon), 2x1 (Feature), and 2x2 (Key Benefit) tiles.
modes.testimonials: Masonry Layout (3 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile).

rules: Optical Alignment: Visually center text if icons are present.
Asymmetry: Use offsets (mt-12) to break visual monotony in grids.

buttons.primary: bg-[#064E3B] text-white hover:bg-[#064E3B]/90 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/20
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-200 text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#064E3B] text-[#064E3B] hover:bg-emerald-50 rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.style: bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#064E3B] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-stone-400 text-stone-900

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise/grain overlay to the entire page (opacity 0.03) to remove 'digital flatness'.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffused shadows (shadow-lg shadow-stone-200/50). No harsh black shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders in stone-200 for definition.

rules: Scroll-triggered animations should be subtle (opacity/y-axis), not aggressive zooms.
Micro-interactions on all buttons and cards.

images.description: Clean desk setup with plant, conveying calm and organization.
Detail shot of monitor and lamp, high quality workspace vibe.
Smiling woman in gray shirt, relatable and trustworthy.
Woman in striped shirt, friendly and professional.

assets.icons: Use Lucide-React (default). Style: Thin stroke (1.5px), rounded corners.
assets.logos: Use placeholder text or simple SVGs for 'Trusted By' section if needed. Avoid fake-looking logos.

rules: Ensure text contrast > 4.5:1 for body text.
Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-emerald-500).
Form labels must be visible (no placeholder-only inputs).

universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use split screens and asymmetric grids.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky navs.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center }).
NEVER use AI assistant emojis (🤖, 🚀, etc) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
Export components as named exports, pages as default exports.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Fonts: Add 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts import in index.css.
3. Theme: Force Light Mode. Do not implement Dark Mode toggle for this specific funnel (trust = light).
5. Hero Section: Use the 'Split Screen' layout. Left side: Headline + Lead Form trigger. Right side: Hero Image.
6. Benefits Section: Use the 'Bento Grid' layout to display features.
7. Social Proof: Create a 'Wall of Love' with the testimonial images provided.
8. Lead Form: Simple form (Name, Email, Phone). Validate inputs. On success, redirect to Thank You page.
9. Thank You Page: Clear success message + $50 Course Upsell card (highlighted with a special border/shadow).
10. Connect: Ensure the lead form connects to the backend API (mock or real) and handles loading/error states.
